basic_details.job_title: SBI Recruitment 2026 for Retired Officers as Resolvers - Apply Online for 105 Posts
basic_details.short_information: State Bank of India (SBI) has released the official Resolvers (Retired Officers) Notification 2026-27 on 15.04.2026 at SBI Careers. A total of 105 vacancies have been announced for engagement on a contract basis under the Customer Experience Enhancement Department. Eligible retired SBI officers aged up to 63 years with prior service in MMGS-II, MMGS-III, or SMGS-IV grades can apply online from 15.04.2026 to 18.05.2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and apply through the direct SBI portal links provided below.

application_fee.details: Nil - No application fee is required.

qualification.details: Educational Qualification / Experience Retired SBI officers of MMGS-II, MMGS-III & SMGS-IV grades only. No specific educational qualification required. Preference will be given to officers having sufficient work experience, deep knowledge of systems & procedures and overall professional competence in the relevant area. | Age Limit (as on 31.03.2026) Maximum age should not be more than 63 years. Engagement is permissible up to maximum 65 years. | Other Eligibility Conditions | Retired on attaining superannuation at 60 years (voluntary retirement/resignation/suspension cases are not eligible except specific VR conditions mentioned in the notification). Unblemished service record, good health, no major ailment. No pending CBI / law enforcement cases. No punishment of Censure or higher in last 5 years of service. Reservation for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD as per rules.

salary_details.pay_scale: Fixed Monthly Remuneration (₹45,000 - ₹50,000) as per grade
salary_details.details: Selected candidates will receive fixed monthly remuneration as under: | Note: Remuneration is without prejudice to pension. No other benefits/perquisites/HRA/PF/Gratuity etc. during contract period.

selection_process: Selection will be based on Shortlisting + Interview.
experience and performance track record. Interview: 100 marks. Qualifying marks decided by the Bank. Merit list prepared circle-wise & category-wise. Final selection subject to medical fitness.
how_to_apply: Eligible retired SBI officers must submit their application online within the specified last date.
Step 2 - Click on Advertisement No. CRPD/RS/2026-27/06
Step 3 - Register online and fill the application form carefully.
Brief particulars of last 10 years experience (PDF)
Step 5 - Submit the application and take a printout for reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is SBI Resolvers Recruitment 2026‑27?
faq.answer: SBI Resolvers Recruitment 2026‑27 is a contractual engagement drive for retired SBI officers (MMGS‑II, MMGS‑III, SMGS‑IV) to work as Resolvers in the Customer Experience Enhancement Department across various circles.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in SBI Resolvers Recruitment 2026‑27?
faq.answer: There are 105 Resolver vacancies distributed circle‑wise across 17 SBI circles such as New Delhi, Lucknow, Patna, Bhopal, Jaipur, Kolkata and others.

faq.question: Q3. What are the application dates for SBI Resolvers Recruitment 2026‑27?
faq.answer: Online registration starts on 15 April 2026 and the last date to submit the application form is 18 May 2026, through the SBI careers portal.

faq.question: Q4. Who is eligible to apply for SBI Resolver posts?
faq.answer: Only retired officers of SBI in grades MMGS‑II, MMGS‑III and SMGS‑IV with an unblemished service record, strong system knowledge and no major penalties or pending vigilance cases can apply; no freshers are eligible.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for SBI Resolvers Recruitment 2026‑27?
faq.answer: The maximum age is 63 years as on 31 March 2026, and engagement is allowed only up to 65 years, subject to satisfactory performance and health.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary or remuneration for SBI Resolver posts?
faq.answer: Retired officers of MMGS‑II and MMGS‑III will get a fixed monthly remuneration of ₹45,000, while SMGS‑IV retirees will receive ₹50,000 per month, without additional allowances; this is in addition to their pension.

faq.question: Q7. What is the contract period for SBI Resolvers 2026‑27?
faq.answer: The initial contract is for 1 year, extendable up to a maximum of 3 years or till the officer attains 65 years of age, whichever is earlier, based on bank’s requirement and performance.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for SBI Resolvers Recruitment 2026‑27?
faq.answer: Selection is through shortlisting and interview: applications are screened based on eligibility and experience, then shortlisted candidates are called for an interview of 100 marks, and a circle‑wise merit list is prepared.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for SBI Resolvers Recruitment 2026‑27?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee; retired officers can apply online for SBI Resolver posts free of cost.

faq.question: Q10. How can retired SBI officers apply online for SBI Resolver Recruitment 2026‑27?
faq.answer: Eligible retirees must visit sbi.bank.in → Careers → Current Openings, select Advt. No. CRPD/RS/2026‑27/06 (Resolvers), register and fill the online form, upload photo, signature, last 10 years’ experience details, ID and DOB proofs, category certificates (if any), and submit the application before 5 May 2026.
